title: Negative controls do not support a robust IPV-specific favorable signal
evidence: Primary delta Spearman is +0.136833 with p=0.30 and CI crossing zero. Controls matching or exceeding primary include future_leaky_full_window_ipv +0.231817, ipv_time_shuffle +0.196823, counterpart_swap +0.168441, role_flip +0.136833, and sign_flip +0.136833. Degradation controls state_shuffle and wrong_state failed; state_shuffle improved baseline Spearman from -0.190937 to +0.105547.
impact: Blocks any claim that the favorable direction is robust or IPV-specific.
required_fix: Rework the negative-control interpretation and require a robustness pass where corruption controls do not equal/exceed the primary effect; otherwise state only weak nonsignificant direction.

title: Corrected model path lacks independent reproduction
evidence: Phase 7 reused the Phase 4 confirmatory script and only swapped corrected labels. The only independent replication artifact is DISCREPANT and reproduces the pre-fix N=48 structural-label analysis, not the corrected N=53 rerun.
impact: Blocks final acceptance of corrected CV predictions and the favorable flip as a stable result.
required_fix: Run an independent corrected N=53 replication without importing Phase 4/Phase 7 modeling code, then reconcile per-cell predictions and metrics.

title: Safe-subset agreement is vacuous
evidence: S1 and S2 each contain exactly the same 53 cells as primary_inclusion; S3 has only 6 cells and is null/reverse on Spearman/MAE. The reported safe_subset_agreement_count=2/3 is therefore not an independent robustness check.
impact: Blocks use of safe-subset requirement_met=True as support for the primary conclusion.
required_fix: Report S1/S2 duplication explicitly and remove safe-subset robustness wording unless a genuinely distinct safe subset agrees.

title: Current wording can overclaim a nonsignificant underpowered direction
evidence: Corrected report says direction=favorable, confirmatory_status=confirmatory, safe_subset_requirement_met=True, and corrected confirmatory result, while primary p=0.30, CI includes 0, LOSO delta Spearman is +0.016732 with MAE/CV-R2 worse, and controls are anomalous.
impact: Blocks reader-facing or paper-facing use until the wording is downgraded.
required_fix: Rewrite result language to say suggestive/nonsignificant favorable direction only; explicitly state robustness and independent replication are blocked.
